shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: TIP #1:DO A TIME AUDIT.

texts.name: TextBox 3
texts.text:
TIP #1:
DO A TIME AUDIT.

shapes.name: TextBox 2
shapes.text: WHY DO A TIME AUDIT?

shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: Keeping track of your daily activities makes you more intentional about where you spend your time. By keeping track of the activities you do in a day, you’ll find out the types of activities that take up most of your time. This allows you to see opportunities where you can be more efficient to be even more productive.

texts.name: TextBox 2
texts.text: WHY DO A TIME AUDIT?

texts.name: TextBox 3
texts.text: Keeping track of your daily activities makes you more intentional about where you spend your time. By keeping track of the activities you do in a day, you’ll find out the types of activities that take up most of your time. This allows you to see opportunities where you can be more efficient to be even more productive.

paragraphs.text: Keeping track of your daily activities makes you more intentional about where you spend your time. By keeping track of the activities you do in a day, you’ll find out the types of activities that take up most of your time. This allows you to see opportunities where you can be more efficient to be even more productive.

runs.text: Keeping track of your daily activities makes you more intentional about where you spend your time. By keeping track of the activities you do in a day, you’ll find out the types of activities that take up most of your time. This allows you to see opportunities where you can be more efficient to be even more productive.

shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: HOW TO DO A TIME AUDIT

shapes.name: TextBox 4
shapes.text: Find out how much time you spend on tasks. Compare your ideal and actual time allotment for tasks, then adjust your schedule accordingly.

texts.text: HOW TO DO A TIME AUDIT

paragraphs.text: HOW TO DO A TIME AUDIT

shapes.name: TextBox 4
shapes.text: TIP #2:CREATE A TO-DO LIST.

texts.name: TextBox 4
texts.text:
TIP #2:
CREATE A TO-DO LIST.

shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: Have only three to five tasks daily. Frequently revisit your list to assess if tasks are doable.

texts.name: TextBox 3
texts.text: Have only three to five tasks daily. Frequently revisit your list to assess if tasks are doable.

paragraphs.text: Have only three to five tasks daily. Frequently revisit your list to assess if tasks are doable.

runs.text: Frequently revisit your list to assess if tasks are doable.

shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: Identify your most important tasks.Tackle them first thing in the morning. They say that's when people tend to be most productive.

texts.name: TextBox 3
texts.text:
Identify your most important tasks.
Tackle them first thing in the morning. They say that's when people tend to be most productive.

shapes.name: TextBox 2
shapes.text: TIP #3:DON’T MULTITASK.

texts.name: TextBox 2
texts.text:
TIP #3:
DON’T MULTITASK.

shapes.name: TextBox 2
shapes.text: THE MULTITASKING MYTH

shapes.name: TextBox 4
shapes.text: Switching between challenging tasks literally drains your brain. It also makes you more likely to commit mistakes.

shapes.name: TextBox 5
shapes.text: Studies show that multitasking negatively affects short-term memory.

texts.name: TextBox 2
texts.text: THE MULTITASKING MYTH

texts.name: TextBox 4
texts.text: Switching between challenging tasks literally drains your brain. It also makes you more likely to commit mistakes.

paragraphs.text: Switching between challenging tasks literally drains your brain. It also makes you more likely to commit mistakes.

runs.text: Switching between challenging tasks literally drains your brain. It also makes you more likely to commit mistakes.

texts.name: TextBox 5
texts.text: Studies show that multitasking negatively affects short-term memory.

paragraphs.text: Studies show that multitasking negatively affects short-term memory.

runs.text: Studies show that multitasking negatively affects short-term memory.

shapes.name: TextBox 2
shapes.text: THE SOLUTION: MONOTASKING

shapes.name: TextBox 3
shapes.text: Monotasking allows you to focus your time and energy to the task at hand.

shapes.name: TextBox 5
shapes.text: Set aside a block of time to do a certain task. Turn off notifications and listen to relaxing music.
